description_long: This is a compact, open-top military-style SUV reminiscent of the classic Willys Jeep, finished in a dark, weathered green with a visible white star insignia on the hood. The vehicle features a flat, upright windshield, exposed wheel arches, and a utilitarian, boxy body with minimal ornamentation. The interior is sparse, with two bucket seats, a simple dashboard, and a steering wheel, all visible due to the lack of doors and roof. At the rear, a spare tire and a jerry can are mounted externally, emphasizing its rugged, off-road character. The wheels are metallic with a basic, utilitarian design, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality over luxury. This SUV is well-suited for urban or off-road environments where maneuverability and robustness are required.
description: A compact, open-top military-style SUV with a weathered green finish, white star insignia, and rugged utilitarian features including a spare tire and jerry can mounted at the rear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, bucket seats, and external spare tire and jerry can at the rear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire, jerry can, and simple rear structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the open interior and utilitarian wheel arches.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the flat windshield, white star insignia on the hood, and classic Jeep grille.
attribute_wheel_design: simple metallic rims with a solid center and minimal spoke pattern
